calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ryan M. Arakawa, esq. (949-207-7100) of Gaba Guerrini Law for Plaintiff United Rentals Inc. via court call.
Colleen Donlon (415-725-0087) Defendant in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Ms. Colleen Donlon is sworn in and responds to questions by the Court and Mr. Arakawa. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff United Rentals Inc's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption

GRANTED under CCP 704.70b2. $2,106.48 - 75% of paid earnings in the account at the time of levy to be released to judgment debtor. Remainder amount of $702.16 would be retained by judgment creditor as partial payment of underlying judgment. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, esq.(415-680-5731) specially appearing for counsel of Plaintiff UNITED RENTAL, INC.
Colleen Donlon (415-725-0087) Defendant in propria persona.
Court reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com

Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Defendant, Ms. Donlon, is sworn in, states that she is contesting the lien and the entire debt, provides a written statement and supporting documents to Ms. Lerche. Ms. Lerche states she is specially appearing, has no authority, and requests a one week continuance to scan documents to counsel of record. Ms. Donlon requests the matter be resolved as soon as possible.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNITED RENTAL, INC.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Continued to March 7, 2019 at 9:30am in Dept 302. The Court expects counsel empowered to resolve the matter to be present either in person or via telephonic appearance.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
